Workflow.Name: RAInspPowerAppV3 -> API_RoomsToAppCollection
Workflow.Description: Query StarRez, Returns all room locations to the bed level and include student initials.

Description.description: Query StarRez, Returns all room locations to the bed level and include student initials.

Workflow.Name: PowerAppV3 -> API_StarRezRoom
Workflow.Description: Query StarRez, Returns all room locations to the bed level and include student initials.

Description.description: Query StarRez, Returns all room locations to the bed level and include student initials.

CanvasApp.Name: cr85e_raroominspectionsdev_fd689
CanvasApp.Description:
RA Room Inspection App
This app is designed to allow RA student staff to collect student room condition data during end of session checkouts.
